creator: freebsd-bugs@siemiradzcy.pl
text:
There is a checksum mismatch for bash43-042:
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for bash/bash43-042.
===>  Giving up on fetching files: bash/bash43-042

% sha256 /usr/ports/distfiles/bash/bash43-042
SHA256 (/usr/ports/distfiles/bash/bash43-042) = ac219322db2791da87a496ee6e8e5544846494bdaaea2626270c2f73c1044919

% grep bash43-042 /usr/ports/shells/bash/distinfo
SHA256 (bash/bash43-042) = b75a53141ab3d8fff3fa74b5f3dc76468b01eae299f50bbc2bc71ae395d690af
SIZE (bash/bash43-042) = 1535

size is the same
